_comment: Intentional doc references the staleness scanner (pnpm docs:staleness) should NOT flag. Paths resolve against GIT-TRACKED files (deterministic across machines + CI), so `paths` = tokens with no tracked file/dir on purpose: illustrative example paths, cross-repo (core-be) paths, and gitignored per-developer local files (mcp.json, settings.local.json). `symbols` = identifiers that intentionally do not exist as a src/ export yet (planned APIs, prose examples). Each entry needs a reason; the scanner is advisory (weekly sync-drift canary) so this list absorbs deliberate references, not real drift. Keep it shrinking toward zero.

paths.reason: AGENTS.md documents this symlink is intentionally absent (Claude Code follows CLAUDE.md).
Prose shorthand for the three real config dirs .claude/ .cursor/ .codex/ in agent-os/evals/README.md.
core-be path listed in a cross-repo requirement table (unified-auth-otp-requirement.md).
core-be path referenced in backend-list-pagination-spec.md (backend conventions).
core-be path referenced in backend-list-pagination-spec.md (backend conventions).
Illustrative example page (e.g. /notifications) in requirement-format SKILL.md.
Gitignored per-developer MCP config, scaffolded by pnpm mcp:setup (.gitignore L79); docs reference it intentionally.
Gitignored per-developer Claude Code local settings (.gitignore L82); docs reference it intentionally.

symbols.reason: Planned PostHog provider; posthog-frontend.md marks it not-yet-implemented.
Illustrative hypothetical hook name ('useNow-style') in codebase-audit-loop.md.
